contributing.headline: 100% of your usage came from subagent-heavy sessions
contributing.detail: Each subagent runs its own requests. Be deliberate about spawning them — and consider configuring a cheaper model for simpler subagents.

contributing.headline: 90% of your usage was at >150k context
contributing.detail: Longer sessions are more expensive even when cached. /compact mid-task, /clear when switching to new tasks.

contributing.headline: 16% of your usage came from subagents under "general-purpose"
contributing.detail: If this runs frequently, consider configuring its subagents with a cheaper model or tightening their prompts.
